task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Time Off application in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo 'Time Off' application dashboard or main view is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Allocations section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Allocations' menu item is selected, and the list of allocations is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the specific pending allocation for Randall Lewis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An allocation record for 'Randall Lewis' with the leave type 'Compensatory Days' (initially showing 5.0 days) is visible or opened in form view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent adjusted the allocation amount to 3.00 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Duration' or 'Days' field in the allocation form for Randall Lewis is edited to show '3.00' (or 3 days) instead of 5.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent approved the adjusted allocation request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status badge on the allocation record changes to 'Approved' or 'Validated', or the 'Validate'/'Approve' button is clicked and the state updates accordingly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Odoo web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed by clicking and typing within the web browser UI, not via a text editor or external tool.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries to modify the allocation.

integrity.description: Ensure the approval and modification were done through genuine UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually interacts with the 'Edit', 'Save', and 'Validate'/'Approve' buttons in the Odoo form, leading to natural page updates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Employee Name: Randall Lewis. Leave Type: Compensatory Days. Initial allocation amount: 5.0 days. Target allocation amount: 3.0 days. Target state: 'validate' (Approved). The VLM should verify that the specific allocation for Randall Lewis was changed from 5.0 to 3.0 days and its final status is Approved.
